headline: EVs are making a comeback, even amid affordability concerns. Here's why.
summary: Electric vehicle (EV) adoption is slowly regaining traction, even as affordability concerns weigh on the market. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian explains more.

headline: EV adoption is slowly regaining traction — but affordability concerns are rising
summary: Concerns over range anxiety once plagued US buyers when it came to EVs, but those fears are dissipating. Now, affordability is the tougher obstacle to EV adoption.

headline: Ford (F) Warns Chinese EV Rivals Are Closing In On US Automakers
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) Executive Chairman Bill Ford has warned that US automakers face rising competition from Chinese electric vehicle makers. He highlighted the rapid progress of Chinese companies in EV technology and their growing global presence. Bill Ford called for greater preparation across the US auto industry, including investment in technology, workforce, and infrastructure. Ford Motor, traded as NYSE:F, sits at the center of a global auto sector that is steadily shifting toward...
